reviews.body: Do a great job for our local hero and legend wot sir Bobby Robson

I have a lot of money in a 5 year bond taken out when interest rates were very low. I politely asked if I could renegotiate the interest rate by a couple of percentage points but was told no. Whilst I understand that I had a contract I would have liked them to demonstrate some compassion, especially in view of how much their CEO and others are earning.

Ray Sisterson
49 reviews

Rated 5 out of 5 stars
2nd to none
I have been helped today i can not tell you how far this person went to see me right today 100 % Fantastic could not ask for any better so thank you Laura Moorhead 5* from me

Date of experience: 15 April 2025
Had a mortgage prodcuct transfer, I was offered better rates with Newcastle as my current provider, that any other provider could offer
No issues, went through a third party but will probably go to NCBS direct next time as so easy.
The online journey was simple and the account will help save for a house deposit
I stayed with Newcastle Building Society after 2 years into my mortgage. They offered very good rate and the process was really simple to switch.

After offering us £20,000 more than we wanted on a mortgage principal certificate we decided to go with them both of us have good jobs and an excellent credit rating without a reason decided to decline the mortgage why offer a mortgage in principle if you take it away there slogan is to look after the people of the North East what a load of rubbish
Everything has been simple and efficient with our mortgage application.  The service has been brilliant and the rate is very competitive. I don't ever want to move my mortgage.
